description: Migrate the GitLab plugin to use SDK utilities: replace manual globalThis access with getPageGlobal, replace manual meta tag reading with getMetaContent, and replace manual waitForAuth with waitUntil.
qualityChecks: cd plugins/gitlab && npm run build && npm run type-check && npm run lint && npm run format:check

userStories.title: Migrate GitLab plugin to SDK utilities
userStories.description: Replace GitLab's manual globalThis access, meta tag reading, and waitForAuth with SDK equivalents.
acceptanceCriteria: CSRF meta tag reading uses getMetaContent('csrf-token') from SDK
waitForAuth uses waitUntil wrapped to return boolean
